$comment: WebGPU validation harness numbers, structured copy of validation/compare.py's WEBGPU dict. dnaDamage block refreshed 2026-05-12 via E13c (Playwright + full validation harness) after the SSB scoring overhaul: (1) split SSB_R_DAMAGE_NM 0.29→1.0 for indirect only, (2) instrumented IRT worker to score during chemistry timeline, (3) calibrated SSB_P_INDIRECT 0.4→0.05. Tracking/preChemistry/chemistry1Us blocks remain from the 2026-04-21 run (unchanged by the SSB scoring fix).

dnaDamage.$comment: Counts on the 21×21 B-DNA fiber grid (3.89 Mbp target) at 10 keV, ~0.243 Gy at 30 μm box. SSB_ind/SSB_dir/DSB refreshed 2026-05-12 after IRT-side indirect SSB scoring (E13c) + P_indirect calibration (0.4 → 0.05). Indirect/direct ratio = 2.96 — in PARTRAC 2-3 band. SSB_dir = 23 (vs prior 24) is MC noise — direct scoring unchanged. kernelHits unchanged.
dnaDamage.$ssb_history: 0.29 nm + P=0.4 (2026-04-21 run): SSB_dir=24 SSB_ind=0 DSB=2 ratio=0. After radius split + IRT-side scoring + P calibration to 0.05 (2026-05-12, E13c-3rd-stage): SSB_dir=23 SSB_ind=68 DSB=1 ratio=2.96 (in PARTRAC band).
